title: Korak 3

challengeFiles.name: main
challengeFiles.contents:
first_name = 'John'
last_name = 'Doe'
print(first_name)
print(last_name)
full_name = first_name + last_name
print(full_name)
challengeFiles.seed:
first_name = 'John'
last_name = 'Doe'
print(first_name)
print(last_name)
full_name = first_name + last_name
print(full_name)

description:
Ako kombinujete dve sekvence karaktera kao 'John' + 'Doe', rezultat je 'JohnDoe' bez razmaka. Da biste ovo popravili, morate kombinovati sekvencu karaktera koja ima razmak (' ') između njih.

Ispravite izmene promenljive full_name ili spojite first_name, razmak i last_name.
